title: Living in Boulder Vlog 2 - 14 - 2017: Caribou in Background

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs while showing a screen capture of Caribou, Colorado, a former silver mining ghost town, sharing brief historical facts about it. He then recounts his day: dealing with insomnia and low productivity, shampooing carpet at his mom's house (causing a sudsy mess), and prepping his car for sale while lamenting that problems keep surfacing whenever he tries to sell it.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: feels it's hurting his productivity and focus
frustrated that new problems keep appearing every time he tries to sell it
regrets using too much concentrated shampoo, creating a long cleanup ordeal

claims.subject: Caribou, Colorado
claims.claim: Caribou, Colorado was a ghost town from 1867 until 1927.

claims.claim: Caribou, Colorado was a silver mining town.

claims.subject: Caribou, Colorado
claims.claim: At its height in the 1870s, Caribou, Colorado had up to 1000 people around the area.

claims.subject: Caribou, Colorado
claims.claim: Caribou, Colorado had six fire hydrants and reservoirs, which you can see on the highway.

claims.subject: Caribou, Colorado
claims.claim: The entire metropolitan area of Caribou, Colorado can be recreated with all the roads and everything using x-ray vision to see through the road.

claims.subject: Cardinal ski resort
claims.claim: Cardinal ski resort was established in the 1940s.

claims.subject: Cardinal ski resort
claims.claim: Miners worked at Cardinal ski resort in the 1940s.

claims.subject: Caribou, Colorado
claims.claim: Even in modern day, there's one building in Caribou, Colorado that's still standing but scarred up.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle is experiencing insomnia and not getting a whole lot of sleep.

claims.claim: Kyle went to his mom's house and slept for like 6 hours.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle made a mistake a few years ago by putting too much concentrated shampoo in his car and it took a long time to clean it out.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle poured a huge kitchen trash can of shampoo all over his car floor and it was sudsie all day long.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle spent like 120 bucks last summer getting somebody to fix his car's interior light, the only car electrical place in the whole area that would check it out.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle fixed the rocket box by stapling it together and plans to do more tomorrow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle is organizing his house, including drawers that fell apart and are being glued back together.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle is considering screwing the drawer back together but worries about hitting something.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle feels so high that he uses music like different words for everything.
